stemHtml: In an aircraft with dual hydraulic systems, loss of hydraulic system pressure from one system will normally be indicated in the cockpit by…

options.a: either a red or amber light, with a loss of system pressure indication and an audio warning.
options.c: a master caution, an amber light and the loss of pressure reading for the affected system.
options.d: a master caution and a red light accompanied by an audio warning for the affected system.
